Transistor.AzureSql.Exporter 2.4.0+b432929bb3
Copyright (C) 2026 Transistor Systems

  -s, --Source Server            Required. The server to connect to for the
                                 database i.e. example.database.windows.net

  -t, --Target Server            Required. The server to restore the database
                                 on.

  -d, --database                 Required. The database to copy locally

  -a, --directoryId              The directory id, required if you have multiple
                                 directories assosiated with your account.

  -e, --excludeTemporalTables    Excludes all temporal tables.

  --help                         Display this help screen.

  --version                      Display version information.
